creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
Patch looks good to me.  It applies from inside pidgin-sipe/.

I gave it a whirl on my 8.2 amd64, with the ocs2005 timeout hack
enabled, and ran into no problems.

I wholeheartedly approve this update to pidgin-sipe 1.13.1, and thank
Golyashov Sergey for yet another great contribution to this port!

--
John Prather
